title: Design System: 台灣勞工權益工具站

display.purpose: Hero and major page headings only.

headline.purpose: Page-level H1 and major section titles.

body.purpose: Readable Traditional Chinese guidance and tool explanations.

label.purpose: Buttons, form labels, chips, table headers.

shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: Low ambient separation for content panels.

shadows.name: mobile-nav-lift
shadows.purpose: Stable separation for the mobile bottom nav.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Small hover and focus state changes.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Cards, chips, buttons and search panel state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button for calculators and high-intent CTAs.

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action for alternate paths and source links.

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Calculator and search input with calm focus state.

components.name: Tool Card
components.description: Clickable entry for calculators, guides and article clusters.
components.html: 算薪資明細計算機輸入月薪，立即算出勞健保扣款與實領金額。
components.css: .ds-card{display:grid;gap:10px;border:1px solid transparent;border-radius:16px;background:#FEFFFF;color:#0F172A;padding:24px;text-decoration:none;box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(15,23,42,.06),0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,.04);transition:border-color .18s ease-out,box-shadow .18s ease-out,background-color .18s ease-out}.ds-card:hover{border-color:#BFDBFE;box-shadow:0 10px 25px rgba(15,23,42,.1)}.ds-card:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #BFDBFE;outline-offset:2px}.ds-card-icon{display:inline-grid;place-items:center;width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:12px;background:#EFF6FF;color:#1D4ED8;font-weight:800}.ds-card strong{font:700 18px/1.35 'Noto Sans TC',Inter,system-ui,sans-serif}.ds-card span:last-child{color:#64748B;font:400 14px/1.7 'Noto Sans TC',Inter,system-ui,sans-serif}

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Category filters for article and tool clusters.

components.name: Top Navigation
components.description: Desktop navigation for tool, guide, article and trust pages.
components.html: 勞工權益站計算工具完整指南權益文章
components.css: .ds-nav{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;height:64px;border-bottom:1px solid #E2E8F0;background:rgba(248,250,252,.94);padding:0 24px;font:600 14px/1.4 'Noto Sans TC',Inter,system-ui,sans-serif}.ds-nav a{border-radius:10px;color:#334155;padding:8px 12px;text-decoration:none;transition:background-color .18s ease-out,color .18s ease-out}.ds-nav a:hover{background:#EFF6FF;color:#1D4ED8}.ds-nav a:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #BFDBFE;outline-offset:2px}.ds-nav-brand{margin-right:auto!important;color:#0F172A!important;font-weight:800!important;font-size:20px!important}

narrative.overview: 這套介面應該像一份乾淨的公共服務帳冊：答案清楚、數字可信、路徑可追。使用者可能正在確認薪資、離職、加班或保險問題，情緒不一定輕鬆；畫面要降低焦慮，不製造聲量。
keyCharacteristics: clear hierarchy, compact enough for repeat use

rules.name: The Blue Is Action Rule
rules.body: 藍色只服務主要動作、選取狀態與可查核路徑，不拿來灑滿整頁。

rules.name: The No Ad-Glow Rule
rules.body: 廣告周圍不得使用吸睛色、箭頭、動態或強提示文案。

rules.name: The Answer First Rule
rules.body: 標題下第一段必須直接回答使用者問題，不重述標題。

rules.name: The Lift Means Click Rule
rules.body: 如果元素不可點擊，不要在 hover 或常態上做強陰影。

dos: Do 把工具結果、公式與官方來源放在同一個任務流裡。
Do 使用 Civic Blue 表示主要動作與可查核路徑。
Do 讓手機上的輸入、按鈕與 chips 達到 44px 以上觸控高度。
Do 在法規、費率、級距更新時同步更新 `/sources`、sitemap 與頁面最後更新日期。
Do 用完整邊框或淡底色處理 callout，不用粗側邊條。
donts: Don't 做誘導點擊的廣告站效果，包含箭頭指向廣告、近距離放置廣告與工具按鈕、或暗示點擊廣告支持本站。
Don't 使用法律恐嚇頁語氣、過度行銷的 SaaS landing page、暗色金融儀表板、紫藍漸層 AI 工具頁、玻璃擬態卡片或浮誇英雄區。
Don't 使用 gradient text、粗側邊條 callout、裝飾性 blur glass、彈跳動效。
Don't 把每個區塊都做成同尺寸 icon card grid。只有工具入口、文章列表、比較入口需要卡片。
Don't 在 GA4 或第三方工具送出薪資、年資、日期、公司名稱或完整搜尋文字。
